settings.heading: Return Policy
settings.intro: We want you to love what you buy. If something isn't right, you have 30 days to return it for a refund or exchange — no questions asked.
settings.cta_body: Email us with your order number and we'll send a pickup label.

settings.heading: The short version
settings.body:
• 30 days from delivery to start a return.
  • Items must be unused, unworn, and in original packaging with all tags attached.
  • Free pickup across India — we arrange the courier.
  • Refund within 7 business days of us receiving the item, to your original payment method.
  • Exchanges are free for the same-priced item in a different size or colour.

settings.heading: What you can return
settings.body:
Most products are returnable within 30 days, provided they are:

  • Unused and unworn (with original tags attached).
  • In their original packaging — including dust bags, boxes, and accessories.
  • Free of stains, smells (perfume, smoke), or pet hair.

What you can't return

  • Items marked “Final sale” on the product page.
  • Personalised, monogrammed, or made-to-order items.
  • Innerwear, swimwear, and pierced jewellery (for hygiene reasons).
  • Gift cards.
  • Items damaged through wear, washing, or misuse.

settings.heading: How to return
settings.body:
1. Email us at returns@example.com within 30 days of delivery, with your order number and the reason for return.
  2. We schedule a free pickup from your address (usually within 2–3 business days).
  3. Pack the item in its original packaging with all tags. Include the order slip if you have it.
  4. Hand it over to the courier when they arrive.
  5. Track the return — we email you when we receive it and again when the refund is processed.

settings.heading: Refunds
settings.body:
Once we receive and inspect your return, we issue a refund within 7 business days. The amount is credited to your original payment method:

  • Razorpay (UPI, cards, netbanking, wallets, EMI) — 5–7 business days to reflect.
  • Cash on Delivery — refunded as a bank transfer; we'll request your account details after pickup.
  • Partial payment — the advance is refunded; the COD balance is simply not collected.

The refund is for the item price. Original shipping is non-refundable unless the return is due to our error (wrong or defective item).

Late refund?

Most refunds reflect within a week. If it's been longer, please first check with your bank or wallet provider. If they confirm there's no pending credit, email us — we'll trace the transfer.

settings.heading: Exchanges
settings.body:
To exchange for a different size or colour of the same item, follow the standard return process and mention “exchange” in your email. We dispatch the new item once we've received the original.

If the new item is a different price, we'll either charge or refund the difference.

settings.heading: Damaged, defective, or wrong items
settings.body: If your order arrives damaged, defective, or different from what you ordered, please email us within 48 hours of delivery — with photos of the item and packaging. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund (including any return shipping at our cost).

settings.heading: International returns
settings.body: For orders shipped outside India, please contact returns@example.com within 30 days. International return shipping is at your cost unless the return is due to our error. Customs duties and taxes paid on the original shipment are not refundable.

settings.heading: Order cancellation
settings.body:
You can cancel an order at no cost any time before it ships. After it ships, the standard return policy above applies.

To cancel, email us at support@example.com with your order number — fastest if within 12 hours of placing the order.

settings.heading: Questions
settings.body: Email us at returns@example.com or use our contact form. We reply within 24 hours on business days.
